sections.name: Indian process
data: Credit hold/prepaid : keep both orders on hold
Ø Prepaid - send request to AP-APAC@masimo.com and cc AR
Ø Credit : send request to AR
Regulatory : MIS order is the one that counts
Order confirmation : not needed, but send SO to Michael
- Configurations :  Need to be entered SOWP (Show with price )  on all lines
- No need to change VAT on MIS
- Change GST on line level based on Customer PO, and/or based on below instructions:
○ KGST - to be applied for customers in state Karnataka
○ IGST - all other Indian customers (outside state of Karnataka)
- Change store code if different in email from Michael
For All Main Devices (RAD, RADICAL, ROOT etc) - GST 5%
If Customer/Distributor within Karnataka State - Tax Code would be KGST5% or KGST18%
If Customer/Distributor within rest of India except Karnataka - Tax Code would be IGST5% or IGST18%
- BT and ST, price as PO which you received from Michael - no need to ask for  quote or anything else
- PN 4509 - overwrite description and enter same as on PO
- Ok to release order  without asking for credit release
Taas invoicing with contract (SCIN..)- Search Contract in SalesForce, take Bill to ID linked to contract for order process
- Check on the price list : here
- Michael usually use 9738-3 to indicate which configuration to use
- Follow the template from the excel file

sections.name: Latam orders
data: All Latam are processed in MIS
If there's no other Hold reasons - adjust dates and open the SO
Send email to ExportAdminstration@masimo.com to quote freight
Email cc: Customer and everyone else
3 Send order confirmation PDF to customer and everyone else
unit PN → EA-20 or EA-25, etc

Denia Urena <durena@masimo.com>; Customer Service - LATAM <CustomerServiceLATAM@masimo.com>; Jorge Mario Aquino <jmaquino@jormarsa.com>; Hilda Martinez <hmartinez@jormarsa.com>; LATAMSales <LATAMSales@masimo.com>

sections.name: Mexico
data: Gracias por su nuevo pedido, le envío la confirmación.
Por favor, hágamelo saber en caso de que tenga alguna pregunta.
Tan pronto como se separen los productos, contactaremos para organizar la recolección.
Pedido confirmado, referencia Masimo actualizada en el asunto del correo   – a partir de ahora por favor todas las comunicaciones de ese pedido deben contener esa referencia en el asunto del correo.
Tan pronto esté lista la factura, se la enviará.
📧 Contacts to add when sending OC
pedidos@toggo.com.mx; Customer Service - LATAM <CustomerServiceLATAM@masimo.com>; Marco Antonio Najera Vera <MNajera@masimo.com>; hramirez@masimo.com; Diego.Jarillo@masimo.com; PAMORAGA@masimo.com
